content: Episodic memory in neural architecture planning agents can be repurposed as a built-in curiosity steering signal for state-of-the-art active learning agents, where unplanned or novel past trajectories stored in episodic memory act as an implicit alternative to traditional curiosity modules like ICM and RND. This creates a synergistic architecture where the planning agent's core memory system doubles as the active learning agent's exploration driver, eliminating the need for separate auxiliary curiosity networks.
source_topics: neural architecture memory episodic planning agent
trigger_topic: neural architecture memory episodic planning agent
